The system exhibits several issues, including ignoring agent suggestions (mathproxyagent repeatedly prompting for information while the assistant continues without it), action-reasoning mismatches (navigator providing simplified implementations instead of actual code), task derailment (proposing simplified code instead of finding the correct implementation), information withholding (providing incomplete information about files), and premature termination (failing a task due to access token issues). There are also instances of step repetition and disobeying task specifications.
